channel.title: Joycon on The Gamer's Hollow
channel.description: Recent content in Joycon on The Gamer's Hollow

item.title: 2021 switch ideas
item.description: So because it is 2021 that means a new year of fun filled excitement about gaming, I am hoping for a switch pro in 2021 and I wanted to talk about that and a few other things involving Nintendo Switch. Apex Legends- is leaked to be coming to switch on febuary second in Japan febuary first in the USA. so we saw a video on YouTube posted by apex Japan and shortly after it was posted the video was taken down and it seemed to be a very strong leak in my opinion.
